overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a stormy Japanese countryside. The character travels from a scorched path with a burning tree, through tall grass meadows, to a riverside with traditional wooden buildings and cherry blossoms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: scorched dirt path with burning tree

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching the burning tree trunk
passing the burning tree, ground begins transitioning from ash to grass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path toward burning tree, observing surroundings

entered.detail: tall tree trunk engulfed in bright orange flames and smoke
ash-covered dirt trail through burnt landscape with blackened stumps
misty mountains under dark storm clouds
pink flowering trees lining the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a scorched dirt path through a burnt landscape. A burning tree trunk stands prominently on the left, while distant mountains and cherry blossom groves frame the horizon under stormy skies.

events.description: ground surface changes from scorched dirt to lush tall green grass
burning tree passes out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass leaving the burnt area behind, heading toward visible water

entered.detail: lush green tall grass swaying in the wind
calm reflective water surface becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Leaving the scorched area behind, the character enters a lush meadow of tall green grass. The burning tree disappears from view as the samurai approaches a river visible in the distance, with mountains still framing the background.

events.description: reaching the water's edge, walking along the shoreline
slight turn to follow the curve of the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along riverbank with water to the left, approaching wooden structure on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden Japanese farmhouse with thatched roof and weathered walls

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along the river's edge with water flowing calmly on the left. A traditional wooden farmhouse appears on the right, while the tall grass now lines the riverbank. The character continues following the shoreline as the landscape opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a devastated landscape that gradually transforms into a lush, riverside settlement. It begins with a samurai walking along a scorched dirt path past a prominently burning tree trunk under stormy skies. As the character leaves the burnt terrain behind, the scene shifts into a vibrant meadow of tall green grass that obscures the fire and leads toward a distant river. The camera then follows the samurai to the water's edge, where the landscape opens up to reveal a traditional wooden farmhouse on the right. Finally, the movement continues along the calm shoreline, with the tall grass now lining the riverbank against a backdrop of distant mountains.
